Instruction.title: Help
Instruction.body1a: This app helps you take control of your finances using the 'Barefoot Investor' method. It splits your money into purpose-driven accounts, tracks every transaction, manages subscriptions, savings goals, emergency funds, investments, and more. The core system uses four main accounts:
Instruction.body2a: Track your everyday expenses here — groceries, fuel, bills. This gives you a real-time view of your daily spending habits.
Instruction.body2b: Your fun money! Use this for treats, dining out, or small indulgences — guilt-free spending within your budget.
Instruction.body2c: Save for bigger goals that make you smile — a holiday, new gadget, or a special purchase. Create Smile Projects to track progress toward each goal.
Instruction.body2d1: Your safety net for emergencies. Within the Fire account, you'll find the
Instruction.body2d3: , a dedicated emergency fund with a target amount and progress gauge.
Instruction.incomeAccountDesc: Record all incoming money here — salary, freelance income, dividends, rental income. The app automatically distributes it across your four accounts.
Instruction.mojoAccountDesc: Spend directly from your emergency fund when needed. Transactions from this account reduce your Mojo balance.
Instruction.body3a: When you record your income, the app distributes it automatically across your accounts. The default split is:
Instruction.body3b: This ensures your income is distributed intelligently, promoting a healthy financial balance.
Instruction.allocationTip: You can customize these percentages in Settings → Automatic Allocation to match your personal strategy.
Instruction.body4: The Cashflow page shows your financial overview: Salary + Passive Income = Total Income − Expenses = Net Cashflow. Use the powerful filter system to analyze specific time periods or categories.
Instruction.transactionsDesc: Every financial movement is tracked as a transaction. You can view all transactions or filter by account (Daily, Splurge, Smile, Fire).
Instruction.transactionsAdd: Tap the + button to add a new transaction with account, amount, date, time, category, and an optional comment.
Instruction.transactionsEdit: Tap any transaction row to view details, then click Edit to modify it.
Instruction.transactionsCopy: Use the Copy button to quickly duplicate a transaction — great for recurring payments you want to add manually.
Instruction.transactionsDelete: In edit mode, use Delete to remove a transaction. The income statement and all project balances are recalculated automatically.
Instruction.transactionsSearchDesc: The search bar supports powerful boolean expressions:
Instruction.transactionsTip: Toggle field-specific search (account, amount, date, category, comment) for precise filtering. Use the account and tag filters on the right to narrow results even further.
Instruction.receiptDesc: When adding a transaction, use the camera icon to scan a receipt. The app extracts the relevant data and pre-fills the transaction form for you — capture from your camera or pick an image from your gallery.
Instruction.subscriptionsDesc: Manage recurring payments like rent, streaming services, insurance, or gym memberships. Subscriptions automatically generate transactions on their schedule.
Instruction.subscriptionsActive: Active subscriptions are listed with their name, account, amount, and start date. A payment-due indicator highlights subscriptions that need attention.
Instruction.subscriptionsInactive: Subscriptions that have passed their end date are moved to the inactive section. Toggle the switch to view them.
Instruction.subscriptionsDue: The due-indicator helps you track which recurring payments are upcoming or overdue.
Instruction.subscriptionsDelete: When deleting a subscription, tick the checkbox to also delete all associated transactions and recalculate your finances. Leave it unticked to only remove the subscription entry.
Instruction.smileProjectsDesc: Create savings goals with a title and target amount. Each project has a progress bar showing how close you are to reaching your goal. When a project reaches 100%, it turns green!
Instruction.smileProjectsCreate: Create a new project by entering a title and a target amount (how much you want to save).
Instruction.smileProjectsTrack: Track progress with visual progress bars. Add money toward any project via transactions with category @ProjectName.
Instruction.smileProjectsCategory: When a Smile project is full (100%), future transactions for that project are automatically skipped — you won't accidentally overfund a completed goal.
Instruction.fireEmergenciesDesc: Fire Emergencies work like Smile Projects but are for your emergency safety net. Create emergency fund projects (e.g., car repair fund, medical fund) and track their progress.
Instruction.mojoDesc: Mojo is your primary emergency buffer. Set a target amount (e.g., 3-6 months of expenses) and watch the gauge chart fill up. The gauge shows how many months of expenses you can cover based on your average monthly spending.
Instruction.mojoTip: Once Mojo reaches its target, additional @Mojo transactions are skipped automatically. Spend from Mojo using the Mojo account to reduce the balance when you need it.
Instruction.growDesc: Track your investments, side projects, and money-making ventures. Each GROW project is an expandable card with full financial details — cashflow, asset value, profit/loss, and an embedded transaction history.
Instruction.growBuySell: Buy & Sell — track stock purchases and sales with quantity and price.
Instruction.growDividend: Dividend — record dividend income from your investments.
Instruction.growPayback: Payback — track loan repayments tied to investment properties.
Instruction.growCashflow: Cashflow — record rental income or project revenue.
Instruction.growPnL: P&L — see profit/loss at a glance for each project.
Instruction.incomeStatementDesc: A detailed breakdown of all revenue and expenses by category. Revenue includes salaries, interest, investment income, and other. Expenses are grouped by account (Daily, Splurge, Smile, Fire, Mojo). Collapsible sections let you drill into each category.
Instruction.balanceSheetDesc: Your complete net worth overview: Assets (cash, valuables, stocks, investments) vs. Liabilities (loans, mortgages). Add assets, shares, investments, and liabilities to keep your balance sheet up to date.
Instruction.budgetDesc: Create a monthly budget to plan your spending. Compare your planned amounts against actual spending and track the difference.
Instruction.budgetCategories: Add budget items with a category and a planned amount.
Instruction.budgetPlanVsActual: The Plan view shows a table with Plan vs. Actual vs. Difference for each category — green when under budget, red when over.
Instruction.budgetNavigation: Navigate month by month to review past budgets or plan ahead.
Instruction.statsDesc: Dive into your financial data with a variety of visualizations and analytics tools:
Instruction.statsPie: Pie Chart — see spending distribution across accounts at a glance.
Instruction.statsHistogram: Histogram — analyze spending patterns over time.
Instruction.statsKPI: KPI Dashboard — key financial indicators summarized.
Instruction.statsBI: Business Intelligence — advanced charts and breakdowns.
Instruction.statsCategory: Category Analysis — deep dive into individual spending categories.
Instruction.statsFinancial: Financial Statements — visual income statement and cashflow charts.
Instruction.statsTip: Use the explorative filter panel to narrow down by date range, amount, accounts, and categories. Toggle the Insights switch for additional commentary.
Instruction.settingsDesc: Customize the app to your needs:
Instruction.settingsLanguage: Language — choose from English, German, Chinese, Spanish, or French.
Instruction.settingsCurrency: Currency — select your currency symbol from common options or enter a custom one.
Instruction.settingsNumberFormat: Number Format — switch between European (1.000,00) and US (1,000.00) formats.
Instruction.settingsDateFormat: Date Format — choose how dates are displayed throughout the app (e.g. DD.MM.YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD).
Instruction.settingsAllocation: Automatic Allocation — adjust the income split percentages for your accounts.
Instruction.settingsEncryption: Encryption — enable local or database encryption with a custom key. Keep your financial data secure.
Instruction.settingsPassword: Change Password — update your account password under Security.
Instruction.settingsFixAccounting: Fix Accounting — recalculate all income statements and project balances from scratch if something seems off.
Instruction.settingsExport: Export — download your data as CSV statistics or a full JSON backup via Settings > Backup.
Instruction.settingsRestore: Restore — import a previously exported JSON backup to recover your data via Settings > Backup.
Instruction.encryptionTip: Enable database encryption to protect your data at rest. Remember your encryption key — without it, encrypted data cannot be recovered!
Instruction.backupDesc: Keep your financial data safe with the built-in backup and restore feature. Access it from Settings > Backup.
Instruction.backupExportDesc: Click Export in your profile. You can choose between:
Instruction.backupExportCSV: Statistics Export (CSV) — downloads your transactions, subscriptions, and mojo as spreadsheet files. Great for analysis in Excel or Google Sheets.
Instruction.backupExportJSON: Full Backup (JSON) — downloads ALL your data (transactions, subscriptions, budgets, projects, income statement, balance sheet, settings) as a single JSON file. If database encryption is active, an encryption key file is also downloaded separately.
Instruction.backupRestoreDesc: Click Restore in your profile. Select your backup JSON file and optionally your encryption key file, then click Start Restore. All data will be written to your current account.
Instruction.backupUseCase1: Regular backups — save a snapshot of your data periodically for safety.
Instruction.backupUseCase2: Undo mistakes — restore a previous backup if you accidentally deleted something.
Instruction.backupUseCase3: Migrate between modes — move your data from Firebase to Self-Hosted or vice versa.
Instruction.backupTip: The backup file does NOT contain your login credentials or user ID. You can safely restore data into any account.
Instruction.selfhostedDesc: By default, the app runs in Firebase mode — your data is stored in Google's cloud. Self-Hosted mode lets you run everything on your own server, giving you full control over your data.
Instruction.selfhostedHowDesc: In Self-Hosted mode, the app connects to a CouchDB database running on your own server instead of Firebase. The backend API handles authentication and data storage locally.
Instruction.selfhostedStack1: Frontend — the same Angular app, built for self-hosted mode.
Instruction.selfhostedStack2: Backend — a Node.js/Express API server handling authentication and database operations.
Instruction.selfhostedStack3: Database — CouchDB for data storage (replaces Firebase Realtime Database).
Instruction.selfhostedStack4: Deployment — Docker Compose or Kubernetes for easy setup on a Raspberry Pi, home server, or cloud VM.
Instruction.selfhostedBenefit1: Full data ownership — your financial data never leaves your network.
Instruction.selfhostedBenefit2: No cloud dependency — works offline on your local network.
Instruction.selfhostedBenefit3: Free forever — no subscription fees, no usage limits.
Instruction.selfhostedBenefit4: Same features — encryption, backups, all accounts and statistics work identically.
Instruction.selfhostedMigrateDesc: Use the Full Backup feature to export all your data from Firebase, then restore it on your self-hosted instance. Your data, settings, and encryption config are all included in the backup.
Instruction.selfhostedTip: Self-Hosted mode is perfect for privacy-conscious users who want full control. Check the project README for setup instructions.
Policy.title: Privacy Policy
Policy.body1: Our app collects financial data, including transactions, to create a comprehensive balance sheet of assets and liabilities for the user.
Policy.body2: The collected data is solely used for providing and enhancing our services, enabling an accurate financial balance based on user preferences.
Policy.body3: We employ state-of-the-art security measures to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of financial data. Our systems are designed to prevent unauthorized access.
Policy.body4: We do not share financial data with third parties unless required by law or necessary for the provision of our services.
Policy.body5: Our app utilizes Firebase, a service provided by Google, for data storage and management.
Policy.body6: Users have control over their data and can request access, correction, or deletion of their information at any time.
Policy.body7: For privacy inquiries, contact Jannis Kluess at janniskluess@yahoo.de. Mailing Address: Guldeinstraße 35, 80339 München
Policy.body8: This privacy policy is regularly reviewed and updated to comply with applicable data protection regulations. Users will be notified of significant changes.
Policy.body9: We process your personal data based on your explicit consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) when you create an account and enter financial data. Processing is necessary for the performance of the service you requested (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
Policy.body10: Under the GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data (Art. 15), rectify inaccurate data (Art. 16), erase your data (Art. 17, right to be forgotten), restrict processing (Art. 18), data portability (Art. 20), object to processing (Art. 21), and withdraw consent at any time (Art. 7(3)). To exercise these rights, contact us at the address provided.
Policy.body11: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, all associated data is permanently removed from our systems within 30 days. Backup copies are purged according to our backup retention schedule.
Policy.body12: This application uses browser local storage to save your preferences (language, number format, date format) and authentication tokens. No third-party tracking cookies are used. Local storage data remains on your device and is not transmitted to external servers.
Policy.body13: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Material changes will be communicated through the application. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
Impressum.disclaimer: This website is a private, non-commercial project. All information is provided without guarantee. The operator assumes no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content provided.

AiAssistant.title: AI Strategy Assistant
AiAssistant.privacyWarning: The prompt will contain your real financial data. Only paste into AI services you trust.
AiAssistant.promptHelp: Copy this prompt and paste it into your favorite AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.). Then paste the response back here.
AiAssistant.importHelp: Paste the AI response below or upload a .json file. The app will automatically extract the project data.
AiAssistant.importTypeHint: Select the type of content you're importing from the AI response.
AiAssistant.pastePlaceholder: Paste the AI response here (full text or JSON)...
AiAssistant.disclaimer: This is not financial advice. AI-generated suggestions are for informational purposes only. Consult a qualified financial advisor before making investment decisions.
AiAssistant.monthlyBudgetHint: Leave at 0 to auto-calculate from your surplus.
AiAssistant.selectPromptType: What would you like help with?
AiAssistant.grow-strategyDesc: Get personalized investment strategies based on your financial situation.
AiAssistant.budget-optimizerDesc: Analyze your spending and optimize budget allocations.
AiAssistant.subscription-auditDesc: Audit your subscriptions to find savings opportunities.
AiAssistant.expense-patternDesc: Uncover spending blind spots and money leaks in your expenses.
AiAssistant.smile-createDesc: Turn your dreams into detailed, budget-conscious plans with research and milestones.
AiAssistant.smile-improveDesc: Enhance existing Smile projects with updated research, budgets, and timelines.
AiAssistant.fire-createDesc: Create structured emergency response plans with debt payback strategies.
AiAssistant.fire-improveDesc: Optimize existing Fire emergencies with better payback plans and resources.
AiAssistant.suggestionCountHint: How many optimization recommendations do you want? (1-20)
AiAssistant.budgetCategoryHint: Choose which budget categories from last month you want to analyze.
AiAssistant.noBudgetsLastMonth: No budgets found for last month. Please create budgets in the Budget feature first.
AiAssistant.minAmountHint: Only analyze subscriptions above this amount. Leave at 0 to include all.
AiAssistant.goalPlaceholder: What do you want to achieve? (e.g., 3-month world tour, dream car, home renovation)
AiAssistant.lenderPlaceholder: Who lent you money and what are the terms?
AiAssistant.numberOfSuggestionsHint: How many different project options should the AI generate? Each option will be a complete plan. Leave unspecified for AI to decide.
AiAssistant.noSmileProjects: No Smile projects found. Create some first using the 'New Smile Project' mode.
AiAssistant.noFireEmergencies: No Fire emergencies found. Create some first using the 'New Fire Emergency' mode.
AiAssistant.yourPlanPlaceholder: e.g. I want to revise my Japan trip based on new research, update budget estimates...
AiAssistant.yourPlanFirePlaceholder: e.g. I want to get better cost estimates for my roof repair, add more prevention steps...
AiAssistant.customInstructionsPlaceholde: Any additional instructions for the AI...

Stats.revenueGrowth2: Change in revenue compared to the previous year.
Stats.goodRevenueGrowth: Good: Consistent or growing revenue growth
Stats.goodEquityReturn: Good: A return on equity above 10% indicates efficient use of equity
Stats.veryGoodEquityReturn: Very good: Values above 15% are considered strong and attractive for investors in most industries
Stats.badEquityReturn: Bad: Values below 10% may indicate low profitability and inefficient capital utilization
Stats.veryBadEquityReturn: Very bad: Negative values indicate losses and are a warning signal for investors
Stats.badNetProfitability: Bad: Fluctuations or low values indicate issues with cost control
Stats.badEquityRatio: Bad: Less than 20%, as high debt levels can lead to problems

Welcome.title: Welcome!
Welcome.subtitle: Track your money, reach your goals.
Impressum.title: Impressum
Onboarding.keyboardHint: Use ← → arrow keys to navigate, Esc to skip
Onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to Money!
Onboarding.step1.body: Your personal finance companion. Track every dollar, plan your goals, and build lasting wealth — all in one place.
Onboarding.step2.title: Daily Account
Onboarding.step2.body: Your everyday spending goes here — groceries, bills, transport. 60% of your income is allocated to this account automatically.
Onboarding.step3.title: Splurge Account
Onboarding.step3.body: Guilt-free spending money! Dining out, entertainment, treats. 10% of your income goes here — enjoy it!
Onboarding.step4.title: Smile Account
Onboarding.step4.body: Save for things that make you smile — a holiday, new gadget, or dream purchase. 10% of income, tracked with projects.
Onboarding.step5.title: Fire Account
Onboarding.step5.body: Your emergency fund and long-term wealth. 20% of income goes here — build your safety net and grow your investments.
Onboarding.step6.title: Powerful Insights
Onboarding.step6.body: Budgets, cashflow charts, balance sheets, and business intelligence dashboards — see your money from every angle.
Onboarding.step7.title: You're All Set!
Onboarding.step7.body: Start by adding your first transaction. Tap the + button on any account page to begin your financial journey.
